name: codex-pet-forge
description: Create validated Codex v2 pets from uploaded character images.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a character image into a Codex pet.
interface.longDescription: A fast reference-image workflow for generating, validating, repairing, previewing, and installing Codex v2 animated pets.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create a Codex pet from my uploaded character image using the fast validated workflow.
